mapper.insert: INSERT INTO core_memory (user_id, scope, category, title, keywords, content, priority, source_session_id, use_count, created_at, last_used_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{scope}, #{category}, #{title}, #{keywords}, #{content}, #{priority}, #{sourceSessionId}, #{useCount}, #{createdAt}, #{lastUsedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM core_memory WHERE user_id = #{userId}
